title: Coal Power Expansion China In Global Context
section_path: Coal Power Expansion China In Global Context
section_path_text: Coal Power Expansion China In Global Context
summary:
Main
As the world grapples with intensifying climate and energy challenges, the future of coal remains a critical issue. Despite global momentum toward decarbonization, recent developments in China reveal that coal continues to play an evolving role in the nation's energy mix. This raises the question: are there meaningful steps toward a greener future that signal a transition to less coal power and more renewable energy?
